name: Mini Forest Run and Rave at JP Nagar - PaceX
description:
Sunrise miles through the lush 
Mini Forest stretch at JP Nagar
, fresh air, tree-lined roads, and high-energy vibes.
And we don’t stop at the finish line. We roll straight into our signature 
Coffee Rave
 at 
URU BREW PARK
 ☕🎶 fresh brews, music, open dance floor, and full post-run celebration mode.
Run hard. Sip slow. Rave louder. 🔥

name: ACER 5K CHALLENGE
description:
MORE THAN A RUN.
A CELEBRATION OF PROGRESS.
ACERUN is Acer's flagship running experience that brings together technology, movement and community on one platform.
Created as part of Acer Day, ACERUN celebrates individuals who strive to move forward—at work, in life and on the road.
Whether you're chasing your first finish line or your fastest one, ACERUN welcomes every runner to be part of an experience that is energetic, inclusive and inspiring.
On 2nd August 2026, thousands of runners will come together in Bengaluru for a memorable 5K journey powered by community, innovation and the spirit to Shift The Game and Set The Pace.
Visit the ACERUN Expo
Complete your race-day preparation by visiting the official ACERUN
Expo Location - Decathlon Brigade Road, Bengaluru
Expo Dates - 31st July & 1st August 2026
Opening Hours - 11:00 AM – 8:00 PM
Make the most of your race day by arriving early to experience the ACERUN Race Village, take on the HyFit Challenges, join the official warm-up, and soak in the race-day atmosphere before the start.

🏃 Participation Rules
• Participants must be medically fit to participate.
• By registering, participants confirm that they are physically capable of completing their chosen distance.
⏱️ Event Rules
• Bib numbers must be worn visibly throughout the race.
• Participants must follow instructions from organizers, volunteers, and officials.
• Misconduct or violation of rules may result in disqualification.
🚑 Safety & Responsibility
• First-aid and ambulance support will be available.
• Participants participate at their own risk.
• Organizers are not responsible for any injury, loss, or damage.
📸 Media Consent
By participating, you consent to the use of your photographs and videos for promotional and marketing purposes.
📢 Event Changes
Organizers reserve the right to modify the date, time, or venue due to unforeseen circumstances.
💳 Refund & Cancellation Policy
❌ No Refund Policy
• All registrations are non-refundable.
• This includes personal cancellations, medical reasons, postponement, or rescheduling.
🔁 Transfer Policy
• Registrations are non-transferable.
• Category changes are permitted only with organizer approval before the deadline.
⚠️ Event Cancellation
• The event may be rescheduled or converted into a virtual run if required.
• No monetary refunds will be issued.
✅ Waiver Statement
By registering, you agree that:
• You are physically fit and adequately trained.
• You understand and accept all risks associated with participation.
• You waive any claims against the organizers, sponsors, and partners.

name: Green BLR 2.0
description:
Green BLR 2.0 is Bengaluru's largest green running movement.
On 23rd August 2026, 5,000 runners will come together for one shared mission to plant 5,000 trees and restore the city's lost greenery.
Every registration plants one sapling. Real trees. Real soil. Real impact.
Join us across three distances — 3K, 5K, and 10K and be part of the run that gives Bengaluru its green back.

:

name: Stonehill Founder's Day Run
description:
Stonehill Founder’s Day Run
:
Raadiant Sports is honored to organize in the beautiful campus of Stonehill International School, a running event for all age groups with choice of distances and also ensure the corporate professionals get to meet and bond with their colleagues around a sporting event.
       Stonehill Founder’s Day Run event comprises of 5K,10K and Half Marathon distances for runners looking to run in individual categories and for the Corporate Professionals we have 4 x 5 Kms Corporate Relay in Men, Women and Mixed categories. But Individuals not planning to run longer distances can form team of 4 members and as a team participate in Open 4 x 5 Kms Relay by making sure of the 4 members atleast 1 is from opposite gender. People who are beginners to running or want to be a part of the event can participate in the 5 Kms Run / Walk Non - Competitive category.
Event Date
: Sunday, 6
th
 September, 2026
Venue
: Stonehill International School
Location of Venue
:
 Stonehill International School is situated at a distance of 18 Kms from Hebbal flyover towards Kempegowda International Airport with driving time of around 20 minutes. The school is next to Padukone Dravid Centre for Sports Excellence.
 
Driving Directions
: Take the Elevated Road towards KIAL from Hebbal – after Yelahanka Airforce station get on to the service road on the Left – At EMMVEE take a Left Turn – at the end of Double Road keep to the right at V Junction – Continue straight, cross the Railway Crossing – take the 1
st
 right and drive around 800 meters to reach Stonehill International School.
Event Categories
:
Ø Half Marathon ( 18 yrs – Above)
Ø 10K Run ( 16 yrs – Above)
Ø 4 x 5 Kms Corporate Relay (Men / Women / Mixed)
Ø 4 x 5 Kms Open Relay (Mixed)
Ø 5 Kms Run / Walk (Non – Timed & Non Competitive) (10 yrs – Above)
Ø 5 Kms Run (Timed & Competitive) (10 yrs – Above)

:

Ø 4 x 5 Kms Open Relay (Mixed): Rs.3400.00

(GST @ 18% Addl)
 
 
Last Date of Online Registration: 27th August, 2026

One City. One Community. One Mission — To SHINE!

This is more than just a run. It's a celebration of fitness, deteracmination, happiness, and community spirit. Whether you're a first-time runner, a fitness enthusiast, or a seasoned athlete, this event is designed for everyone who believes in pushing boundaries and embracing a healthier lifestyle.

name: HEART-ATHON
description:
HEART-ATHON
On World Heart Day, Run for your Heart…
About Aster RV Hospital
:
"Aster RV Hospital JP Nagar, Bangalore is a part of the DM Healthcare chain, established to provide world-class, patient-centric centres, driven by medical innovation and culture of excellence. The state-of-the-art super speciality hospital is 250 bedded and offers comprehensive primary care to quaternary care services, with centres of excellence in Cardiac Sciences, Neuro Sciences, Orthopaedics, Organ transplantation, Gastro Sciences and minimally invasive surgeries backed by high-end critical care and emergency medicine. Aster RV Hospital JP Nagar, Bangalore has best in class infrastructures and technology like Biplane Cath lab, Intra operative MRI and Da Vinci Robot. Aster RV also has a 53 bedded ICU."
 
Brief about HEART-ATHON
:
 To Celebrate World Heart Day and to encourage people to lead a healthy lifestyle to prevent heart related ailments, Aster RV Hospital is organising 3rd edition of Heart-athon comprising Strong Heart Run 7.2 Miles (11.60 Kms) as ideal heart rate is around 72 beats per minute and Healthy Heart Run 3.6 Miles (5.80 Kms). Both are Timed & Competitive Categories.
   
Event Date
: Sunday, 20
th
 September, 2026
Venue
: Aster RV Hospital, 24
th
 Main Road, 1
st
 Phase, JP Nagar, Bengaluru.

:

Ø Healthy Heart 3.6 Miles (5.8 Kms) (10 yrs – Above)

:

Ø Healthy Heart 3.6 Miles (5.8 Kms):  Rs.750.00
(GST@18% Addl)

: Thursday, 10th September, 2026

: 
Strong Heart 7.2 Miles (11.6 Kms) & Healthy Heart 3.6 Miles (5.8 Kms)

name: Breakthrough Run
description:
Breakthrough Run
Resolution started the journey. Commitment kept you showing up. Persistence carried you through. Now it’s time for your breakthrough.
The Breakthrough Run is the fourth and final event in the four-run journey that transforms intentions into habits and habits into lasting change.
Featuring distances up to the Half Marathon (21.1K), this edition allows participants to celebrate how far they have come and achieve the goals they set for themselves at the beginning of the year.
With every step, you complete the journey — and earn the beautiful composite medal that symbolises a year of intention, commitment, persistence, and breakthrough.
Because breakthroughs aren’t found in a single moment, they are built through the choices you make, one step at a time. With every step, you move closer to completing the journey - and to earning the beautiful composite medal that represents your progress through the series.
Series Finisher Reward
As part of the 4-Run Series, participants who complete all four runs will earn a special composite finisher medal - the Soaring Eagle, a symbol of consistency, strength, and commitment across the year.
Race Categories
Timed 21.1k
Timed 10k
Timed 5k
Non-timed 3k
Non-timed 1.6k
Participant Perks
The Unmatched BeAthlit Experience
Personalised Finisher Medal
Cool Runner's T-shirt
Snack Box
Professional Event Photos
Hydration stations every 800 Mtrs
Venue Details
NICE Tollgate Hosakerehalli, NICE Road
Parking will be available near the event venue.
Event Requirements
 Open to all age groups
 Registration fees are non-refundable
 Participants must follow event rules and local regulations
 Respect the venue, volunteers, and fellow runners

name: Bengaluru Corporate Wellness Run 2026
description:
Bengaluru Corporate Wellness Run 2026
Run for a Healthy Life
Global Events & Entertainment proudly presents the Bengaluru Corporate Wellness Run 2026—a premier corporate fitness and wellness event designed to promote healthier lifestyles, workplace well-being, and community engagement.
Scheduled for Sunday, 15th November 2026, at the iconic NICE Road, Bengaluru, this flagship event will bring together corporate professionals, business leaders, entrepreneurs, fitness enthusiasts, students, and families for an unforgettable celebration of health, fitness, and teamwork.
Whether you're aiming to achieve a personal best, strengthen team spirit, or simply enjoy an energetic morning with friends and family, the Bengaluru Corporate Wellness Run 2026 offers an inspiring experience for participants of all fitness levels.
Race Categories
🏃 3 KM Fun Run – Perfect for beginners, families, and recreational runners.
⏱️ 5 KM Timed Run – Ideal for fitness enthusiasts and corporate teams.
🏅 10 KM Timed Run – A competitive challenge for experienced runners.
Participant Benefits
Every registered participant will receive:
- 👕 Premium Event T-Shirt
- 🎽 Official Race Bib
- 🏅 Exclusive Finisher Medal
- 📜 Digital Finisher Certificate
- 🎁 Goodie Bag
- 🥣 Healthy Breakfast
- 🥤 Refreshments & Hydration
- 🚑 Comprehensive Medical Support
- 📸 Professional Event Photography
- 💃 High-Energy Zumba Warm-up Session
Event Details
📅 Date: Sunday, 15th November 2026
📍 Venue: NICE Road, Bengaluru
Limited slots are available across all race categories. Register early to secure your place and be part of one of Bengaluru's most exciting corporate wellness events.
Corporate Bookings & Partnership Opportunities
We invite organizations, corporate teams, brands, and institutions to partner with us in promoting health, wellness, and employee engagement through this landmark event.
Run Together. Stay Healthy. Build Stronger Teams.
Note: In the event of inclement weather, unforeseen circumstances, or any major incidents that pose a threat on the day of the event, the organizers retain the authority to reschedule the Event. Please note that no refunds will be provided in the event of such circumstances. Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.

description:

 is one of Bengaluru's most exciting running events, bringing together runners of all ages, fitness levels, and goals.

half marathon in Bengaluru, a 10K timed run, a 5K fitness run, or a 3K family fun run

this marathon offers the perfect platform

professionals, amateurs, hobby runners, and families
 — ensuring everyone enjoys the marathon environment.
